scriptLines:
query: 'SELECT
    TRIM(CAST(transportista_id AS NVARCHAR)) AS transportista_id,
    TRIM(razon_social)                       AS razon_social,
    TRIM(nit)                                AS nit,
    TRIM(municipio)                          AS municipio,
    TRIM(contacto)                           AS contacto,
    TRIM(telefono)                           AS telefono,
    TRIM(estado)                             AS estado
FROM bronze.agenciasedem_transportistas',
municipio = iif(isNull(municipio) || trim(replace(municipio, '"', '')) == '' || upper(trim(replace(municipio, '"', ''))) == 'NULL', toString(null()), initCap(trim(replace(municipio, '"', '')))),
contacto = iif(isNull(contacto) || trim(replace(contacto, '"', '')) == '' || upper(trim(replace(contacto, '"', ''))) == 'NULL', toString(null()), initCap(trim(replace(contacto, '"', '')))),
nit = iif(isNull(telefono) || trim(replace(telefono, '"', '')) == '' || upper(trim(replace(telefono, '"', ''))) == 'NULL', toString(null()), trim(replace(telefono, '"', ''))),
telefono = iif(isNull(telefono) || trim(replace(telefono, '"', '')) == '' || upper(trim(replace(telefono, '"', ''))) == 'NULL', toString(null()), trim(replace(telefono, '"', ''))),
estado = iif(isNull(estado) || trim(replace(estado, '"', '')) == '', toString(null()), upper(trim(replace(estado, '"', ''))))) ~> derivedColumn1
